name: postgres-ctl
description: Control PostgreSQL server (start, stop, restart, recreate, status) and manage databases, users, config, run SQL via inline query, --psql, -f FILE, or stdin pipe, force-start with cleanup, recreate cluster when recovery is stuck, and wait for readiness, set trust auth and restart; with --no-header and --csv for SQL output control, or revert trust back to scram-sha-256 for cleanup.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: start, stop, restart, recreate, status (default), check

parameters.name: --db
parameters.description: Database name to connect to for queries

parameters.name: --user
parameters.description: PostgreSQL system user (default: postgres)

parameters.name: --port
parameters.description: PostgreSQL port (default: 5432)

parameters.name: --host
parameters.description: PostgreSQL host

parameters.name: --list-dbs
parameters.description: List all databases

parameters.name: --list-users
parameters.description: List all PostgreSQL users/roles

parameters.name: --list-config
parameters.description: Show PostgreSQL config settings (port, etc.)

parameters.name: --psql
parameters.description: Run a SQL query directly

parameters.name: --reset-db
parameters.description: Drop and recreate a database

parameters.name: --create-ext
parameters.description: Create a PostgreSQL extension

parameters.name: --no-sudo
parameters.description: Run psql directly without sudo su

parameters.name: --force
parameters.description: Force start with aggressive cleanup (kill stale processes, remove pid, pg_resetwal)

parameters.name: --log
parameters.description: Show last N lines from PostgreSQL log (default: 30)

parameters.name: --check-process
parameters.description: Show running PostgreSQL processes

parameters.name: -f
parameters.description: Read SQL query from file

parameters.name: --wait
parameters.description: Wait up to N seconds for PostgreSQL to become ready (default: 120); replaces sleep+pg_isready polling loops

parameters.name: --wait-interval
parameters.description: Poll interval in seconds when --wait is active (default: 5)

parameters.name: --trust-auth
parameters.description: Set trust authentication in pg_hba.conf and restart PostgreSQL

parameters.name: --no-header
parameters.description: Suppress column headers in SQL query output

parameters.name: --csv
parameters.description: Output SQL query results as CSV format

parameters.name: --reset-auth
parameters.description: Revert trust authentication to scram-sha-256 in pg_hba.conf and restart PostgreSQL

examples.expected: pg_hba.conf updated to use trust authentication, PostgreSQL restarted
pg_hba.conf updated: trust replaced with scram-sha-256, PostgreSQL restarted

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses sed + pg_ctlcluster restart + pg_isready into one step; --reset-auth reverts trust auth during cleanup, saving 5-6 agent steps per auth config change.
